---
title: "References"
---

A topical reading list of works underpinning the methods used across CTIR packages and the wider trauma / tissue-injury literature.

## Disclaimer

The lists on these pages are **not** an exhaustive or systematically curated bibliography. They do not necessarily reflect the full breadth of any field, and individual entries have not all been read in full or independently verified by the editor. Treat them as starting points and inspiration — pointers to further reading rather than authoritative recommendations.

For canonical references underpinning a specific CTIR package, consult that package's `inst/CITATION` file or its documentation directly.

When DOI-verified citations are added to the project's [`references.bib`](https://github.com/CTTIR/ressources/blob/main/references.bib), the CI pipeline runs `scripts/verify-dois.R` on every push to confirm each DOI resolves.

## Sections

- [Dimensionality reduction](dimensionality-reduction.qmd)
- [RNA-seq & bulk omics](rna-seq-and-bulk-omics.qmd)
- [Single cell & cell reports](single-cell-and-cell-reports.qmd)
- [Molecular pathology](molecular-pathology.qmd)
- [R package development](r-package-development.qmd)
- [Tidyverse](tidyverse.qmd)
- [Reproducible research](reproducible-research.qmd)
- [Trauma biomarkers](trauma-biomarkers.qmd)
- [Tissue injury](tissue-injury.qmd)
